home.ctaText: Not sure which machine fits your production?
home.ctaTextStrong: We can talk through a few options

about.title: Wings Graphic Machinery
about.p1: We work with used equipment for print shops, packaging producers and allied industries across Europe and beyond.
about.p2: Our focus is on prepress systems, sheet-fed and web presses, finishing and postpress equipment — and packaging machinery. Clear information and realistic pricing from first contact to running machine.

about_page.heroFallbackSubtitle: Used equipment for print shops – prepress, presses and finishing – across Europe and beyond.
about_page.introLead: WingsGM works with used equipment for printing companies: prepress systems, sheet-fed and web presses, and a wide range of finishing / postpress machines. Our focus is on clear information and a project that feels organised from start to finish.
about_page.sellingTitle: Selling used equipment for print shops
about_page.sellingText: Our primary work is selling used equipment for printing companies: presses, finishing lines and supporting machines. The goal is not just to move a machine, but to make sure it fits the production it is going into.
about_page.sellingList2: Finishing / postpress: cutting, folding, binding, etc.
about_page.sellingList4: Projects across Europe and overseas export
about_page.sellingVisualText: Clear information about machine condition, history and timing from the beginning of the project.
about_page.buyingText: When you upgrade your press room, reorganise or close a line, we can buy your machines or offer them to trusted partners in our network.
about_page.buyingList1: Quick and realistic feedback on your offers
about_page.buyingList2: Guidance based on current market conditions
about_page.buyingVisualText: You know what the next steps are: evaluation, price indication and possible deal structures.
about_page.servicesText: We are not trying to replace technicians or transport companies. Our role is to connect the main steps into one clear project for you.
about_page.service1Text: Short consultations about models, configuration and what makes sense for your production and budget.
about_page.service2Text: Support with organising inspection, dismantling, loading and transport together with experienced partners.
about_page.langsSubtitle: English and Deutsch – so you can discuss, negotiate and sign in the language you use every day at work.
about_page.lang2Desc: Direkter Kontakt mit deutschsprachigen Kunden und Partnern.

contact_page.heroSubtitle: Let us know what kind of used printing machinery you are looking for – or which machines you would like to sell. We buy, sell and support projects across Europe.
contact_page.infoText: Reach us by phone, email or via the contact form on the right.
contact_page.infoNote: We consult in English and German and work with clients across Europe and beyond.
contact_page.formSubtitle: Tell us briefly what you are looking for – format, brand, year, budget – or which machines you would like to sell.
contact_page.statusOk: Thank you – we will get back to you shortly.
contact_page.statusSub: We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_page.statusError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

stock_page.title: Machinery stock list
stock_page.subtitle: Browse available machines and use the filters on the left to find the right press for your production.

machine_page.formIntro: Please leave us a message about
machine_page.formIntroEnd: and we will get back to you soon.

footer.desc: Used printing machinery dealer based in Europe. Quality equipment from trusted brands.
